description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a metallic, industrial finish and several gold-colored cylindrical elements along the receiver. The body is constructed from a dark, textured metal with visible bolts and mechanical details, giving it a futuristic, high-tech appearance. The stock is angular and reinforced, with a thumbhole grip for ergonomic handling. The fore-end includes a rail system for attachments and a prominent under-barrel component, likely a tactical light or laser. The barrel is relatively short and compact, with ribbing and venting visible along the top. Overall, the weapon exudes a sense of durability and advanced engineering, suitable for urban combat scenarios.
description: A futuristic, metallic shotgun with gold accents, a tactical rail system, and an angular thumbhole stock. The design is robust and detailed, featuring mechanical and ergonomic enhancements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, gold cylindrical details, thumbhole stock, and under-barrel attachment.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the compact barrel, rail system, and symmetrical gold elements on the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the stock and mechanical details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure, thumbhole grip, and alignment of the gold elements along the top.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbing and venting along the top; compact length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with reinforced edges and a slight forward extension
